nasb.text: Then the Lord met Balaam and put a word in his mouth and said, “Return to Balak, and thus you shall speak.”

esv.text: And the Lord met Balaam and put a word in his mouth and said, “Return to Balak, and thus shall you speak.”

cnv.text: 耶和華見了巴蘭，把話傳給他，說：“你回到巴勒那裡去，要這樣這樣說。”

ccb.text: 耶和华向巴兰显现，告诉他当说的话，让他转告巴勒。
